bead.title: execute-bead: land step must independently verify the merged tree builds/tests before accepting — agents --no-verify-bypass the gate and land broken code
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The execute-bead land path can report success after merging a worker result without independently verifying the merged tree, so a bypassed hook or stale local state can still land broken code.

ROOT CAUSE
cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_orchestrator.go:247-327 evaluates pre-merge gates and then delegates to the landing advancer, but it does not run an independent post-merge build/test verification before returning a merged outcome. The land helper also allows `--no-merge` preservation and the evidence commit path uses `--no-verify`, so hook bypass is already part of the surrounding flow.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a land-time verification step that checks the merged tree directly before accepting the result, and only report a merged/landed outcome when that verification passes. On failure, preserve the result and surface a blocked or preserved outcome instead of accepting broken code.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change the worker execution harness, decomposition flow, or unrelated commit-trailer logic.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestLandBeadResult_RequiresIndependentVerificationBeforeMergedOutcome fails when the merged tree does not pass the required verification gate and preserves the result instead of reporting success.
2. TestSubmitWithPreMergeChecks_StillHonorsBypassedHooksButDoesNotSkipLandVerification covers the bypass path and proves the new land-time verification still runs.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestLandBeadResult_RequiresIndependentVerificationBeforeMergedOutcome|TestSubmitWithPreMergeChecks_StillHonorsBypassedHooksButDoesNotSkipLandVerification' -count=1 passes.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"missing_root_cause_or_current_state: This is a single-slice land-path bug, not a split candidate, but the bead is not executable as written because it lacks a concrete root cause anchor and any acceptance or verification gate.
